title: Kinda Cursed
description: A mod that adds new curses to the game
body:
Curses in vanilla Minecraft are a completely forgotten and abandoned mechanic, this mod was created to fill this deficiency

[ ![Cozy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![Cozy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sinytra/.github/main/badges/connector/cozy.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)

### Added Curses:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. **Curse of Heavy Burden** - If the player has a cursed item in their inventory, then when the player is in the liquid, they may begin to drown until they throw the item away
2. **Curse of Discord** - neutral mobs around the player will sometimes become aggressive towards him
3. **Curse of Doom** - The player will die if his health is <= 1 (half a heart)
4. **Curse of Slippery Hands** - when attacking a mob or trying to destroy a block with a cursed item, it may slip out of your hands

</details>

**Requires [ActiveEnchantmentsLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/active_enchantments_lib)**

**To run on NeoForge you need [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) and [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api)**

I recommend using it together with [Sneaky Curses](https://modrinth.com/mod/sneaky-curses)
